# Pull Request Format

## Title
`[type] short description` — must match the branch name. e.g. `[feature] add vpc module`

## Related Issue
Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## What Changed
<!-- Bullet points summarizing the changes made. -->
- 

## Why
<!-- Why was this change needed? Link back to the issue if relevant. -->

## How to Test
<!-- Steps to verify this works correctly. -->
1. 
2. 

## Checklist
- [ ] Branch follows naming convention (`type/description`)
- [ ] `documentation.md` updated
- [ ] `progress.md` updated
- [ ] `explanations.md` updated (if a new concept was introduced)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
